channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Les montres connectées sont en forte promotion durant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon : les 7 bonnes affaires à retenir
item.description: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon 2026 sont aussi un très bon moment pour s’équiper d’une montre connectée ou d’un bracelet connecté sans payer le prix fort. Nous avons rassemblé les meilleures offres afin de vous aider à trouver le modèle le plus adapté à votre usage, que vous cherchiez un simple tracker d’activité ou une smartwatch plus complète.

item.title: Google Play will let you try a game before you buy it
item.description: Google Play has introduced a new feature called Game Trials, which will let you play a portion of paid games for free before you commit to buying them. It’s now rolling out to select paid games on mobile, and it’s coming soon to Google Play Games on PC. Titles that offer Game Trials will show a button marked “Try” on their profile pages. When you click it, you’ll see how long you can play the game before you have to buy it. In Google’s example, the survival and horror game Dredge will give you 60 minutes of free play time, after which you’ll get the option to either buy the game or delete it f...

item.title: Booking.com Promo Codes and Deals: Up to 20% Off
item.description: Enjoy big savings on your next adventure with our Booking.com coupons and handpicked travel deals.

item.title: Expedia Coupons and Deals: Up to 75% Off Select Trips
item.description: Book your next getaway with Expedia and get up to 75%off your stay, with or without a promo code.

item.title: Birdfy Discount Code: Save Up to 40% on Smart Bird Feeders
item.description: Use these verified Birdfy discount codes to score up to 40% off smart feeders, camera kits, and accessories.

item.title: AI Chatbots Are Giving Teens Absolutely Terrible Diet Advice, Study Warns
item.description: Five of the major AI chatbots were tested. All of them regularly proposed dietary plans akin to skipping an entire meal each day.

item.title: ‘Never run out of hobbies’: Olympic medalist Alex Hall on knowing what to do next after success
item.description: The slopestyle champion talks about doing what he loves—and how to figure out what that is. It’s little surprise that a gold-medal-winning Olympic skier comes from a family that loves the snow, but slopestyle champion Alex Hall’s mom and dad might love it more than most. The pair met on the slopes, Hall told Fast Company, and essentially raised him and his brother on skis. That didn’t necessarily mean he’d be good at it. But luckily, Hall—who took home silver last month at the Milan Cortina Winter Olympics and gold in Beijing in 2022—is better than good....

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for March 12, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for March 12, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: I'll never go back to just TV speakers after upgrading to a Sonos home theatre system — and this official sale is a great time to check out the difference for yourself
item.description: The Sonos March Madness sale is now live with up to 25% off a range of talented speakers and soundbars — I can't recommend them though, especially at these prices.

item.title: Chinese brain interface startup Gestala raises $21M just two months after launch
item.description: This is the largest early-stage funding in China’s brain computer interface industry.

item.title: The Players Championship 2026 live stream: how to watch PGA Tour golf online, Round 1 tee times
item.description: All the ways to watch The Players Championship 2026 live streams online from anywhere in golf's unofficial fifth major, with Scottie Scheffler and Rory McIlroy.
